description_long: This is a small, opaque plastic bottle with a rounded body and a short neck, topped by a green screw-on cap. The bottle features a single molded handle attached to the neck, making it easy to grip and pour. The front label displays the brand 'Log Cabin' and includes green and red text, with additional product information and decorative elements. The surface of the bottle is matte and slightly textured, with visible seams and a printed label that wraps around the lower half. The back and sides of the bottle show more product details and nutritional information, though the text is partially blurred. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, everyday personal care product designed for portability and ease of use.
description: A small, opaque plastic bottle with a green screw-on cap, molded handle, and a printed label featuring the 'Log Cabin' brand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'Log Cabin' branding, green cap, and handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle and partial label text, with the cap and neck clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label with product details and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing mostly blank surface with partial label and cap visible.
